violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Additional staff to be certified discussed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Establishment does not have an individual with Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Establishment has an individual with accredited food safety manager certificate. Establishment to register individual. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the self dispensing ice machines have an accumulation of pink and black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC expired. Once food safety certificate is obtained, Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license must be re-instated. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the employee break room restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
